ticker: Tracking political accountability in real time

value.title: ICE Agents Deploy to Airports Amid TSA Staffing Crisis and Budget Disputes
value.summary: ICE agents have been deployed to U.S. airports as TSA faces significant staffing shortages during ongoing federal funding disputes. The deployment raises questions about the expanding role of immigration enforcement in transportation security settings.
value.analysis: This development may signal broader use of immigration agents in non-traditional roles, potentially affecting traveler screening processes. Congressional budget negotiations will likely determine whether this becomes a temporary measure or establishes new operational precedents.
